551.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed over Ibn al-Dahdah. He was then brought a horse, and it set off with him moving with short, quick steps.
551.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyalatkan Ibn al-Dahdah. Kemudian didatangkan kepadanya seekor kuda, dan kuda itu bergerak bersamanya dengan langkah-langkah pendek yang cepat.

552.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I saw a seal on the back of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that resembled a pigeon's egg.
552.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku melihat sebuah tanda di punggung Rasulullah ﷺ yang menyerupai telur merpati.

553.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Prophet of Allah ﷺ say: 'There will be twelve commanders.' He then said a word I did not hear. I asked the people around me what he said, and my father told me he said: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
553.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi Allah ﷺ bersabda: 'Akan ada dua belas pemimpin.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku dengar. Aku bertanya kepada orang-orang di sekitarku apa yang beliau katakan, dan ayahku memberitahuku bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

554.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that whenever the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate food, he would send the remainder to Abu Ayyub (may Allah be pleased with him). Once he sent him leftovers that contained garlic. Abu Ayyub came to him and asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, is it forbidden?' He said: 'No, but I dislike it because of its smell.'
554.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa setiap kali Rasulullah ﷺ memakan makanan, beliau mengirimkan sisanya kepada Abu Ayyub (radhiyallahu 'anhu). Suatu kali beliau mengirimkan kepadanya sisa makanan yang mengandung bawang putih. Abu Ayyub datang kepadanya dan bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah ini haram?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak, tetapi aku tidak menyukainya karena baunya.'

555.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that whenever food was brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he ate from it, he would send the remainder to Abu Ayyub (may Allah be pleased with him). Abu Ayyub would place his fingers where he saw the traces of the Messenger of Allah's ﷺ fingers. Once, food containing garlic was brought. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not eat from it and sent it to Abu Ayyub as it was.
555.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa setiap kali makanan dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau memakannya, beliau mengirimkan sisanya kepada Abu Ayyub (radhiyallahu 'anhu). Abu Ayyub selalu meletakkan jari-jarinya di tempat yang ia lihat ada bekas jari-jari Rasulullah ﷺ. Suatu kali, makanan yang mengandung bawang putih dibawa. Rasulullah ﷺ tidak memakannya dan mengirimkannya kepada Abu Ayyub apa adanya.

556.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: People used to call it Yathrib and Medina, so the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Allah, the Blessed and Exalted, has named it Taybah.'
556.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Orang-orang biasa menyebutnya Yatsrib dan Madinah, maka Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah, Yang Mahasuci lagi Maha Tinggi, telah menamainya Taybah.'

557.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'That one of you should discipline his child is better for him than giving half a sa' in charity every day.'
557.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bahwa salah seorang di antara kalian mendidik anaknya lebih baik baginya daripada bersedekah setengah sha' setiap hari.'

558.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had Ma'iz stoned, without mentioning flogging.
558.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ merajam Ma'iz, tanpa menyebut hukuman dera.

559.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Before the Hour there will be liars.'
559.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebelum Kiamat akan ada para pendusta.'

560.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man was at al-Harra with his father when another man told him: 'My she-camel has gone missing. If you find her, keep her.' The man found the camel, but its owner did not come until it fell ill. His wife said: 'Slaughter it so we can eat it.' He refused, and it died. He then went to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about this matter, and the Prophet ﷺ gave him a ruling on it.
560.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki berada di al-Harra bersama ayahnya ketika orang lain memberitahunya: 'Unta betinaku hilang. Jika kamu menemukannya, jagalah dia.' Laki-laki itu menemukan unta itu, tetapi pemiliknya tidak datang hingga unta itu jatuh sakit. Istrinya berkata: 'Sembelihlah agar kita bisa memakannya.' Ia menolak, dan unta itu pun mati. Ia kemudian pergi kepada Rasulullah ﷺ mengenai hal ini, dan Nabi ﷺ memberikan keputusan hukum kepadanya.

561.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not perform the funeral prayer over a man who had killed himself.
561.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ tidak menyalati seorang laki-laki yang telah membunuh dirinya sendiri.

562.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ addressed the people at Arafah and said: 'This matter will remain strong and unassailable against those who oppose it, until twelve caliphs rule.' He then said a word I did not understand, and I asked my father what he said, and he replied: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
562.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkhutbah kepada orang-orang di Arafah dan bersabda: 'Urusan ini akan tetap kuat dan tidak tertandingi terhadap mereka yang menentangnya, hingga dua belas khalifah memerintah.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku pahami, dan aku bertanya kepada ayahku apa yang beliau katakan, dan ia menjawab: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

563.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ addressed the people at Arafah and said: 'This matter will remain standing always, until twelve have ruled.' He then said a word I did not understand. I asked my father, and he said he said: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
563.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkhutbah kepada orang-orang di Arafah dan bersabda: 'Urusan ini akan tetap tegak selamanya, hingga dua belas orang telah memerintah.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku pahami. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku, dan ia berkata bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

564.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) and from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with them both) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had a Jewish man and a Jewish woman stoned.
564.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ merajam seorang laki-laki Yahudi dan seorang perempuan Yahudi.

565.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to command them to fast on the day of Ashura, urge them to do so, and check on them regarding it. When Ramadan was made obligatory, he neither commanded them nor forbade them from it, and no longer checked on them regarding it.
565.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memerintahkan mereka untuk berpuasa pada hari Asyura, mendorong mereka untuk melakukannya, dan memantau mereka mengenainya. Ketika Ramadan diwajibkan, beliau tidak lagi memerintahkan maupun melarang mereka melakukannya, dan tidak lagi memantau mereka mengenainya.

566.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded them to perform wudu after eating camel meat, but not after eating sheep meat. He commanded them to pray in sheep pens but not in camel resting-grounds.
566.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan mereka untuk berwudhu setelah memakan daging unta, tetapi tidak setelah memakan daging domba. Beliau memerintahkan mereka untuk shalat di kandang domba tetapi tidak di tempat unta beristirahat.

567.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man slaughtered himself with a broad-headed arrow, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not pray over him.
567.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki menyembelih dirinya sendiri dengan anak panah berkepala lebar, dan Rasulullah ﷺ tidak menyalatinya.

568.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and found him reclining on his elbow.
568.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan mendapatinya bersandar pada sikunya.

569.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that Simak asked him about the physical description of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He said: 'His eyes had a redness in them, his mouth was wide, and his heels were lean.'
569.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Simak bertanya kepadanya tentang gambaran fisik Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Matanya memiliki sedikit warna merah, mulutnya lebar, dan tumitnya ramping.'

570.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, after praying Fajr, would remain seated in his prayer place until the sun had fully risen.
570.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, setelah shalat Subuh, tetap duduk di tempat shalatnya hingga matahari terbit sepenuhnya.

571.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ stoned a Jewish man and a Jewish woman.
571.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ merajam seorang laki-laki Yahudi dan seorang perempuan Yahudi.

572.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ stoned a Jewish man and a Jewish woman.
572.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ merajam seorang laki-laki Yahudi dan seorang perempuan Yahudi.

573.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, has named Medina Tabah.' Jabir said: and I heard this.
573.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah, Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung, telah menamakan Madinah Tabah.' Jabir berkata: dan aku mendengar ini.

574.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had slender calves, and he never laughed except with a smile. Whenever I saw him, I would say he had kohl-like eyes, yet he did not actually use kohl.
574.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memiliki betis yang ramping, dan beliau tidak pernah tertawa kecuali dengan senyuman. Setiap kali aku melihatnya, aku akan berkata bahwa matanya seperti menggunakan celak, padahal beliau sebenarnya tidak menggunakan celak.

575.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man's mule died, so he came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ seeking a ruling. Jabir ibn Samura reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked the man: 'Do you have anything else that can suffice you?' He said: 'No.' He said: 'Then go and eat it.'
575.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seekor bagal milik seorang laki-laki mati, maka ia datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ untuk meminta fatwa. Jabir ibn Samura melaporkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya kepada laki-laki itu: 'Apakah kamu punya sesuatu yang lain yang bisa mencukupimu?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kalau begitu pergilah dan makanlah.'

576.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ delivering the sermon while standing, then sitting once without speaking, then standing again and delivering a second sermon.
576.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia melihat Rasulullah ﷺ menyampaikan khutbah sambil berdiri, kemudian duduk sekali tanpa berbicara, lalu berdiri lagi dan menyampaikan khutbah kedua.

577.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'May I pray in the garment I wear when I come to my wife?' He said: 'Yes, unless you see something on it, in which case wash it.'
577.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Bolehkah aku shalat dengan pakaian yang aku kenakan ketika mendatangi istriku?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, kecuali jika kamu melihat sesuatu padanya, maka cucilah.'

578.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard a man ask the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'May I pray in the garment I use when I come to my wife?' He said: 'Yes, unless you see something on it, in which case wash it.'
578.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Bolehkah aku shalat dengan pakaian yang aku gunakan ketika mendatangi istriku?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, kecuali jika kamu melihat sesuatu padanya, maka cucilah.'

579.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I came with my father to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he was saying: 'This matter will remain righteous until twelve commanders have led.' He then said a word I did not understand, so I asked my father what he said. He replied: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
579.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku datang bersama ayahku kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau sedang bersabda: 'Urusan ini akan tetap baik hingga dua belas pemimpin telah memimpin.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku pahami, maka aku bertanya kepada ayahku apa yang beliau katakan. Ia menjawab: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

580.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'This matter will continue to proceed until twelve commanders have stood over you.' He then said a word that was hidden from me, so I asked my father about it. He said: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
580.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Urusan ini akan terus berlanjut hingga dua belas pemimpin berdiri memimpin kalian.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tersembunyi dariku, maka aku bertanya kepada ayahku. Ia berkata: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

581.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was with his father in the presence of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This religion will remain honourable' — or he said: 'The people will remain in good' — until twelve commanders have led them.
581.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bersama ayahnya di hadapan Rasulullah ﷺ. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Agama ini akan tetap mulia' — atau beliau bersabda: 'Orang-orang akan tetap dalam kebaikan' — hingga dua belas pemimpin telah memimpin mereka.

582.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was sitting with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when people asked him: 'Do we need to perform wudu after eating sheep meat?' He said: 'If you wish, perform wudu; if you wish, do not.' They asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, do we need to perform wudu after eating camel meat?' He said: 'Yes, perform wudu after eating camel meat.'
582.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia sedang duduk bersama Rasulullah ﷺ ketika orang-orang bertanya kepada beliau: 'Apakah kami perlu berwudhu setelah memakan daging domba?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jika kalian mau, berwudhulah; jika kalian mau, jangan.' Mereka bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah kami perlu berwudhu setelah memakan daging unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, berwudhulah setelah memakan daging unta.'

583.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This matter will remain strong and unassailable; those who adhere to it will be victorious over those who oppose them, until twelve caliphs.' He then said a word that the crowd noise prevented me from hearing, so I asked my father what he said, and he replied: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
583.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Urusan ini akan tetap kuat dan tidak tertandingi; mereka yang berpegang padanya akan unggul atas mereka yang menentang mereka, hingga dua belas khalifah.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang keributan orang-orang menghalangi aku untuk mendengarnya, maka aku bertanya kepada ayahku apa yang beliau katakan, dan ia menjawab: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

584.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'This matter will remain honourable until twelve caliphs.' The people cheered and shouted, and he then said a quiet word. I asked my father: 'What did he say?' He replied: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
584.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Urusan ini akan tetap mulia hingga dua belas khalifah.' Orang-orang bersorak dan berteriak, kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu dengan pelan. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku: 'Apa yang beliau katakan?' Ia menjawab: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

585.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to sit between the two Friday sermons, delivering them while standing, reading from the Quran on the minbar, and his prayer and sermon were both moderate in length.
585.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa duduk di antara dua khutbah Jumat, menyampaikan keduanya sambil berdiri, membaca dari Al-Qur'an di atas mimbar, dan shalat serta khutbahnya keduanya sedang dalam panjangnya.

586.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: When we came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, each of us would sit wherever he found a place — there was no pushing or crowding.
586.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Apabila kami datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, masing-masing dari kami akan duduk di mana pun ia menemukan tempat — tidak ada saling dorong atau berdesakan.

587.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Seek Laylat al-Qadr in the last ten nights — in the odd nights.' And he described Medina as a good place.
587.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Carilah Lailatul Qadar pada sepuluh malam terakhir — pada malam-malam ganjilnya.' Dan beliau menggambarkan Madinah sebagai tempat yang baik.

588.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that Medina was mentioned to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, so he said: 'Allah, the Blessed and Exalted, is the One Who named Medina Tabah.' Jabir said: and I was hearing him.
588.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Madinah disebutkan kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, maka beliau bersabda: 'Allah, Yang Mahasuci lagi Maha Tinggi, adalah Dzat yang menamakan Madinah Tabah.' Jabir berkata: dan aku mendengarnya.

589.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he prayed behind the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on an Eid day without adhan or iqama. Simak also reported that he prayed behind al-Nu'man ibn Bashir and al-Mughira ibn Shu'ba without adhan or iqama.
589.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia shalat di belakang Rasulullah ﷺ pada hari raya tanpa adzan maupun iqama. Simak juga melaporkan bahwa ia shalat di belakang al-Nu'man ibn Basyir dan al-Mughira ibn Syu'ba tanpa adzan maupun iqama.

590.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) from someone who narrated to him that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This religion will remain standing, with a group of Muslims fighting for it, until the Hour comes.'
590.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari seseorang yang menceritakan kepadanya bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Agama ini akan tetap tegak, dengan sekelompok Muslim yang berjuang untuknya, hingga Kiamat tiba.'

591.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I saw the Seal between the shoulders of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.
591.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku melihat Cincin Kenabian di antara kedua pundak Rasulullah ﷺ.

592.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: We were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ at the funeral of Abu al-Dahdah. He was on a horse that moved with short, quick steps, and we were walking quickly around him.
592.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Kami bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam prosesi jenazah Abu al-Dahdah. Beliau menunggangi seekor kuda yang bergerak dengan langkah-langkah pendek yang cepat, dan kami berjalan cepat di sekelilingnya.

593.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: Ma'iz ibn Malik came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'I have committed fornication.' He turned him away twice, then had him stoned.
593.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Ma'iz ibn Malik datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: 'Aku telah berzina.' Beliau menolaknya dua kali, lalu merajamnya.

594.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ addressed the people at Arafah and said: 'This matter will remain strong, unassailable, victorious over those who oppose it, until twelve caliphs.' He then said a word I did not understand, so I asked my father what he said, and he replied: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
594.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkhutbah kepada orang-orang di Arafah dan bersabda: 'Urusan ini akan tetap kuat, tidak tertandingi, dan unggul atas mereka yang menentangnya, hingga dua belas khalifah.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku pahami, maka aku bertanya kepada ayahku apa yang beliau katakan, dan ia menjawab: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

595.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ at the Farewell Pilgrimage saying: 'This religion will remain dominant over everyone who opposes it, and those who disagree with it or abandon it will not harm it.'
595.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ pada Haji Wada' bersabda: 'Agama ini akan tetap unggul atas setiap orang yang menentangnya, dan mereka yang tidak setuju atau meninggalkannya tidak akan membahayakannya.'

596.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This religion will remain honourable and unassailable; those who uphold it will be victorious over those who oppose it, until twelve caliphs have led.' The people began standing and sitting in commotion, and he said a word that they drowned out.
596.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Agama ini akan tetap mulia dan tidak tertandingi; mereka yang mempertahankannya akan unggul atas mereka yang menentangnya, hingga dua belas khalifah telah memimpin.' Orang-orang mulai berdiri dan duduk dalam kegaduhan, dan beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang mereka tenggelamkan suaranya.

597.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When Caesar perishes, there will be no Caesar after him. When Kisra perishes, there will be no Kisra after him. By Him in Whose Hand is my soul, you will spend their treasures in the way of Allah.'
597.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila Kaisar binasa, tidak akan ada Kaisar setelahnya. Apabila Kisra binasa, tidak akan ada Kisra setelahnya. Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, kalian akan membelanjakan harta-harta mereka di jalan Allah.'

598.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'After me there will be twelve commanders.' He then said a word that I did not hear. I asked those around me, and my father told me he said: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
598.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setelahku akan ada dua belas pemimpin.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku dengar. Aku bertanya kepada orang-orang di sekitarku, dan ayahku memberitahuku bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

599.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade selling animals for animals on credit.
599.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang menjual hewan dengan hewan secara kredit.

600.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I was sitting in a gathering in which the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was present, and he said things that those present affirmed and listened to attentively.
600.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku sedang duduk di sebuah majelis yang di dalamnya terdapat Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau mengatakan hal-hal yang dibenarkan dan didengarkan dengan penuh perhatian oleh mereka yang hadir.
